description.en: ANumber. The length in bits of the RSA modulus. This should be at least 2048: see for example seeSP 800-131A Rev. 2. Some organizations are now recommending that it should be 4096.

excerpt.es: ANumber. The length in bits of the RSA modulus. This should be at least 2048: see for example seeSP 800-131A Rev. 2. Some organizations are now recommending that it should be 4096.
